title: EzCrafts
description: This plugin makes SMP crafts like Ez gaps and Ez Cobwebs craftable Combined in SINGLE Plugin.
body:
This plugin makes SMP like crafts possible easily! I added the popular EzGaps and EzWebs combined into singular plugin. I hope you like it!

-----------------------------
Recipes: 

Golden apple: air, gold_ingot, air, gold_ingot, apple, gold_ingot, air, gold_ingot, air.

Cobwebs: String, air, string, air, string, air, string, air, string<

-----------------------------
